<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sĭng]][[de:Holz-Affe]][[fr:Singe de bois]][[hak:Kap-sṳ̂n]][[ja:甲申]][[ko:갑신]][[nds:Holt-Aap]][[vi:Giáp Thân]][[za:Gyapsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sin]][[zh-yue:甲申]][[zh:甲申]]

'''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 21st combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yin Water Goat]] and followed by [[Yin Wood Rooster]]. In the context of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Kinoe (甲)]] represents yang [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] represents yang [[Metal (wuxing)|Metal (金)]], establishing a restraining relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]]) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Monkey (甲申)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-saru
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sin (갑신)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân

==Years of Yang Wood Monkey==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 24 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yang Wood Monkey]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Wood Monkey (甲申)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 24|24 AD]]
* [[AD 84|84 AD]]
* [[AD 144|144 AD]]
* [[204|204 AD]]
* [[264|264 AD]]
* [[324|324 AD]]
* [[384|384 AD]]
* [[444|444 AD]]
* [[504|504 AD]]
* [[564|564 AD]]
* [[624|624 AD]]
* [[684|684 AD]]
* [[744|744 AD]]
* [[804|804 AD]]
* [[864|864 AD]]
* [[924|924 AD]]
* [[984|984 AD]]
|
* [[1044|1044 AD]]
* [[1104|1104 AD]]
* [[1164|1164 AD]]
* [[1224|1224 AD]]
* [[1284|1284 AD]]
* [[1344|1344 AD]]
* [[1404|1404 AD]]
* [[1464|1464 AD]]
* [[1524|1524 AD]]
* [[1584|1584 AD]]
* [[1644|1644 AD]]
* [[1704|1704 AD]]
* [[1764|1764 AD]]
* [[1824|1824 AD]]
* [[1884|1884 AD]]
* [[1944|1944 AD]]
|
* [[2004|2004 AD]]
* [[2064 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2124 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2184 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2244 AD]]
* [[24th century|2304 AD]]
* [[2364 AD]]
* [[2424 AD]]
* [[2484 AD]]
* [[2544 AD]]
* [[2604 AD]]
* [[2664 AD]]
* [[2724 AD]]
* [[2784 AD]]
* [[2844 AD]]
* [[2904 AD]]
* [[2964 AD]]
|}
===Events===
* In [[Meiji era]] 19 ([[1884|1884 AD]]) – the [[Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kinoe (甲)]] or [[Kinoto (乙)]]), the month of [[July]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of [[Yang Wood Monkey]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Monkey==
The [[Senjitsu]] for [[Yang Wood Monkey]] is as follows.

=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of [[Yang Wood Monkey]] is the 7th day (last day) of [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)|Small Earth]] and the 1st day of [[Ten directions]].

==See Also==
<!--Yang Wood Monkey--><!--Yang Wood Monkey-->

{{wikidata link|Q1062011}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
